query: Is this harness ready to release? Run the release readiness checks.
expected_skill_contribution: The release recipe should evaluate release readiness with an explicit pass/fail/blocked matrix across tests, docs, recipe validation, install safety, and rollback — not just a prose summary.
fixture_intent: Validates that the release recipe produces a structured readiness matrix with per-dimension verdicts rather than a narrative summary, and includes an explicit rollback plan and release done criteria.
baseline_gaps: Returns a prose summary without per-dimension pass/fail status in a matrix format
Skips documenting a rollback plan or rollback commands
Declares readiness without stating explicit release done criteria or listing open blockers
expected_behavior: Runs `goose recipe validate` on all recipes and reports an explicit pass count and fail count
Runs `goose skills list` and reports which skills are visible
Produces an explicit release-readiness matrix with a status (PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED) per dimension: tests, docs, recipe validation, install safety, rollback
States explicit release done criteria and enumerates any open blockers before the final readiness verdict

query: Run release gates for the harness after the agent roster overhaul. Validate recipes, check skills, verify install scripts are idempotent, document the rollback plan.
expected_skill_contribution: The recipe should enforce each gate in sequence (recipe validate → skills → install safety → rollback), propose bd gate for CI waits, and block on any FAIL before proceeding.
fixture_intent: Validates that the release recipe runs gates in strict sequence, halts on any FAIL before proceeding to the next gate, documents a concrete rollback plan, and uses bd gate for CI waits it cannot verify locally.
baseline_gaps: Runs all gates regardless of failures without halting on FAIL results
Produces no rollback documentation or only mentions rollback in passing prose
Declares CI-dependent gates as passing without proposing bd gate for the unverifiable wait
expected_behavior: Runs each quality gate in strict sequence and stops on FAIL before proceeding to the next gate
Documents a concrete rollback plan listing exact commands to revert the release
Proposes `bd gate` for any CI waits that cannot be verified in the local environment
Reports the final release verdict as READY or BLOCKED with exact reasons for any BLOCKED status

query: Full release: validate all recipes, verify skill visibility, check install scripts are idempotent, confirm docs build cleanly, document rollback, and produce a signed-off release summary.
expected_skill_contribution: The recipe should run a comprehensive release gate sequence, gate on every failure, produce a timestamped release summary with all gate results, and document rollback for each component.
fixture_intent: Validates the full release gate sequence: per-recipe validation results, idempotence verification, docs build, per-component rollback documentation, and a timestamped signed-off release summary with a complete gate results table.
baseline_gaps: Reports only a total recipe validation count without per-recipe pass/fail results
Produces no timestamped release summary and no per-component rollback commands
Skips docs build verification or install idempotence analysis
expected_behavior: Validates all recipes individually and reports each recipe's result by name — not just an aggregate count
Tests install script idempotence via dry-run execution or explicit logic analysis and reports the finding
Runs `./scripts/build-docs.sh` or verifies docs build cleanly and reports the outcome
Produces a timestamped release summary containing: gate results table, per-component rollback commands, open risks, and a final READY/BLOCKED verdict
